_authoring_notes: Per Jonathan's locked decisions on the mockup audit (2026-04-28):
#1: Lifecycle strip dropped (was 'too on the nose' for trade-association readers who already know what their professions do). The headline carries the framing; the cards do the rest.
#9: Numbered chips below H1+tagline ALSO dropped (confirmed since lifecycle strip is going away; chips were redundant with the strip).

2026-04-29 Template C alignment (per Memberships hub precedent): H1 inline overrides REMOVED (font-family Roboto Slab, font-size 54px, text-transform:none, letter-spacing). H1 now inherits The7 default (Open Sans Condensed bold UPPERCASE). Inner wrapper text-align:center DROPPED (matches Memberships hub left-aligned hero). Sub max-width 740 to 780, drop margin:0 auto. H1 margin 24px to 16px.

settings.html:
Professional Communities

The four professions that keep housing moving.

Five Star Institute organizes and connects the servicers, attorneys, real estate professionals, and preservation specialists who form the operational backbone of the mortgage and housing industries.
